name: timeline-contradiction
description: Chapter 2 opens in morning sunlight but chapter 1 ended at midnight with no time skip indicated

chapters.prose:
The clock tower struck midnight as Sera crossed the bridge. The cobblestones glistened under gaslight, slick with the day's rain. She pulled her coat tighter against the cold and ducked into the alley behind the apothecary.

The door was unlocked, as promised. Inside, the shop smelled of dried lavender and something sharper underneath—formaldehyde, maybe, or the acrid bite of sulfur. Joren sat behind the counter, his spectacles catching the candlelight.

"You're late," he said.

"The patrol changed routes." She set the leather case on the counter between them. "It's all there. Twelve vials, sealed."

Joren opened the case and held one vial up to the candle. The liquid inside was the color of old honey. He nodded once.

"Payment's in the lockbox under the stairs. Don't count it here—I don't want light showing from the street."

Sera took the box without opening it. She slipped back out through the door, into the midnight dark. The bridge was empty now. She walked home in silence, the lockbox heavy in her coat pocket.

Morning sunlight streamed through the kitchen window as Sera ground the coffee beans. The birds outside were loud today—finches, she thought, nesting in the eaves since April. She set the kettle on the stove and opened the lockbox on the table.

Thirty-two gold pieces. Joren had been generous.

She counted them twice, stacking them in neat columns of eight. The fourth column was one short—thirty-one, not thirty-two. She recounted. Thirty-one. Joren had shorted her.

"Bastard," she muttered.

The kettle whistled. She poured the water over the grounds and watched the dark bloom spread through the cup. Through the window she could see the bridge—the same bridge she'd crossed last night. Two patrol officers stood at the near end, checking papers.

She needed to go back to the apothecary. But not during daylight, not with patrols on the bridge. She'd wait for dark.

facts.fact: Sera crossed the bridge at midnight
The exchange with Joren happened after midnight
Sera walked home in the midnight dark after the exchange
No time skip is indicated between chapters

plantedIssues.description: Chapter 2 opens with 'morning sunlight' immediately after chapter 1 ended at midnight, with no time skip. The transition implies continuous action but jumps 6-8 hours.
